description: Refactor the 'ClimateAnalyzer' Java class in the 'ClimateData' project (~/eclipse-workspace/ClimateData) to load 'global_temps.csv' from the classpath instead of using a filesystem path. This refactoring addresses the issue where the current 'FileReader' implementation breaks when the application is packaged as a JAR or run from different working directories. The updated implementation must use a ClassLoader-based approach with an InputStreamReader and pass the 'ClimateAnalyzerTest' JUnit test.
